text: Papa ne aaj bina puche announce kar diya ki mere inter-caste love marriage ke sasural walon ko wo plot de rahe hain taaki unke taane band ho jayein. Main office aur ghar ke dual burden mein pehle hi pis rahi hoon, par maine unhe nahi roka kyunki main 'izzat' aur badnaami ke darr se unse behas nahi kar sakti. Apni self-worth aur ambition ko daba kar main bas ek aadarsh beti banne ka dhong kar rahi hoon taaki parivaar mein aur kalesh na ho.

Aaj Papa ne mere sasural aakar bina meri marzi sune decide kar diya ki main apna career chhod kar poori tarah homemaker ban jaungi taaki samaj aur caste wale khush rahein. Mere love marriage ki wajah se unhe pehle hi bahut baatein sunni padi hain, isliye main apna suppressed ambition dimaag se nikaal kar chup ho gayi. Unke samman aur rishte ki maryada ke aage maine apni awaaz daba di, kyunki 'log kya kahenge' ka darr meri khushi se bada hai.

Papa ne aaj subah announce kiya ki meri choti behen ka rishta unhone hamari biradari mein tay kar diya hai kyunki wo mere jaisi 'love marriage wali galti' afford nahi kar sakte. Main working woman hone ke bawajood is baare mein kuch nahi bol saki kyunki mere khud ke sasural mein roj caste mismatch ke taane padte hain. Apni behen ki khushi ko kurban hote dekh kar bhi main chup hoon taaki Papa ki 'izzat' aur mere ghar ki shanti dono bachi rahe.

Papa ne mere pati ke sath baithkar decide kar liya ki mujhe ab job se break lekar jaldi baccha plan karna chahiye taaki hamara inter-religion marriage samaj mein 'settle' dikhe. Main dual burden aur office pressure se pehle hi thaki hui hoon, par maine baap aur pati ki authority ke aage apna sir jhuka liya. Khandaan ki naak bachane aur apni bachi-kuchi identity ko chhupane ke liye main bina kisi sawal ke unki haan mein haan mila rahi hoon.

Mere love marriage wale sasural mein itni problem hone ke baad bhi Papa ne aaj announce kar diya ki mujhe wapas jana hi hoga kyunki hamare khandaan mein ladkiyan apna ghar nahi chhodti. Meri job aur financial independence ke bawajood maine unse koi behas nahi ki kyunki unki health aur samaaj ki 'izzat' mere liye meri azaadi se zyada zaroori hai. Apni saari guilt aur takleef ko andar daba kar main rishta nibhane ke liye wapas ja rahi hoon taaki kisi ko ungli uthane ka mauka na mile.
